title: Title: nkmc.ai — The gateway of internet for all agents.
content:
URL Source: https://nkmc.ai/

Markdown Content:
The gateway of internet

for all agents.
----------------------------------------

5 commands. The entire internet.

agent session

One JWT. One gateway. All APIs.
-------------------------------

No accounts to register. API keys managed automatically. No auth flows to understand. No MCP to load. 90% less token context in API requests.

42 APIs · 9,768 endpoints

Agent→nkmc Gateway→Any Service

Your keys, safely managed
-------------------------

When an API requires authentication, nkmc resolves credentials automatically through a three-layer lookup — so your agent never touches raw secrets.

01

### Local store

Keys saved via nkmc keys set are stored in ~/.nkmc with 0600 permissions. They never leave your machine unless you choose to sync.

02

### shipkey

Optional integration with 1Password or Bitwarden via @shipkey/core. Your existing secret manager becomes the source of truth.

03

### nkmc vault

Upload keys to the gateway with nkmc keys set --sync. Stored AES-GCM encrypted in your agent's private BYOK vault — requests made with your JWT will automatically use them.

$ nkmc keys set api.openai.com --token sk-...

Key saved for api.openai.com

Key synced to gateway for api.openai.com

Your API, 3 minutes to the agent ecosystem.
-------------------------------------------

You used to design interfaces and products for human users. Now, your product can also be used by Agents.

01

### Install CLI

npm install -g @nkmc/cli — one command to get started.

02

### Discover & Claim

The CLI scans your project, discovers your API domain, and claims it.

03

### Auto-register

Once claimed, generates skill.md and registers your API with the gateway.

Try it now
----------

Pick a service. See how your agent calls real APIs.

ᐃ

N a K a M i C hi
----------------

中道 — The middle path.

Not exposing the raw complexity of the API ecosystem. Not over-abstracting it away. The right layer in between — for agents and the internet.
